JavaScript test scripts for object properties, operators, arithmetic, comparisons, and logical operations.

## Folders
- **[11.01](11.01/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for object properties, loops, addition, and undefined checks.
- **[11.02](11.02/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for object properties, `Animal` objects, `toString` method, and `arguments` behavior.
- **[11.03](11.03/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for post-increment and post-decrement operator behavior.
- **[11.04](11.04/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for operators like delete, void, typeof, increment, decrement, unary plus/negation, bitwise NOT, and logical negation.
- **[11.05](11.05/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for multiplication, division, and modulus operations with various data types.
- **[11.06](11.06/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for string operations, arithmetic, and object coercion, including special cases.
- **[11.07](11.07/README.md)**: JavaScript bitwise shift operation tests, including left, right, and unsigned right shifts.
- **[11.08](11.08/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for comparison and membership operators with various data types.
- **[11.09](11.09/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for equality and inequality comparisons between various data types.
- **[11.10](11.10/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for bitwise AND, OR, and XOR operations, including variable immutability and assertions.
- **[11.11](11.11/README.md)**: Test scripts for logical AND and OR operations with various data types in JavaScript.
- **[11.12](11.12/README.md)**: Test scripts for conditional and ternary operator behavior in JavaScript.
- **[11.13](11.13/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for value assignment, equality assertion, and various operations.
- **[11.14](11.14/README.md)**: Test scripts for evaluating JavaScript comma expressions and variable assignments.
